seo.title: Submit Your Film | San Roku Ku
seo.description: Submit your film, series, or documentary for distribution and potential release on our YouTube channel.

hero.title: Distribute Your Films, Series, or Documentaries
hero.intro: San Roku Ku helps independent filmmakers bring their stories to audiences worldwide. Beyond traditional distribution, we also accept films for our YouTube channel, a fast-growing platform where you can build an audience, increase visibility, and monetize your work, all while keeping full creative control.

lookingFor: Feature films of 80 minutes or longer
TV or web series with episodes of 20 minutes or longer
cards.notAcceptTitle: We Are Not Able To Accept
notAccept: Works in languages other than English or Japanese
Films already widely released or sold in major territories
Screenplays or project pitches without a completed film

note: If you do not hear from us within 14 business days, please understand that your film was not selected at this time. Thank you for your submission.
